title: Integrate Katerina's new Calculator - evaluate and incorporate the updated pricing calculator into the SOW Generator
Audit and optimize the SOW Generator application - review for performance improvements, code cleanup, dependency updates, and technical debt
notes: Full audit completed 2026-03-04. Identified 22 issues across performance, architecture, UX, and security. Breaking into phased child beads.

title: Fix dashboard performance - replace full-table status fetch with aggregation query
notes: Dashboard fetches ALL SOW rows with select('status') just to count by status. Should use database aggregation. Primary cause of slow front page load.

title: Standardize API error responses across 71+ routes
notes: Three different error patterns in use: {error: string} with status, new NextResponse(string, {status}), and {message: string, statusCode}. Need consistent error response shape, proper status codes, and actionable messages.

title: Add autosave with status indicator and unsaved-changes warning
notes: SOW form has no autosave feedback and no beforeunload warning. Users can lose work by navigating away. Need: visual save indicator, periodic autosave, and browser warning on unsaved changes.

title: Add inline form validation per field
notes: Validation only runs on final submit across 8+ tabs. No inline hints or per-field errors. Users discover problems too late. Need field-level validation with helpful requirements shown upfront.

title: Replace console.log with centralized logger
notes: 932 console.log/console.error statements scattered throughout the app. A logger utility exists at /src/lib/utils/logger.ts but isn't used. Replace debug logging with structured logger, remove debug artifacts.

title: Clean up root directory - move docs and SQL files
notes: 34 markdown and SQL files cluttering root directory. Move documentation to /docs/, SQL migration files to /supabase/migrations/, helper scripts to /scripts/. Includes: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md, FIX_RLS_POLICIES.sql, DATABASE_MIGRATION_INSTRUCTIONS.md, etc.

title: Improve TypeScript safety - reduce Record<string, unknown> usage
notes: 111 instances of Record<string, unknown> or Record<string, any>. Missing proper types for JSONB fields (billing_info, pricing_roles, template). Also 28 eslint-disable comments that should be resolved at root cause.

title: SOW list API: replace select('*') with field-specific query
notes: src/app/api/sow/route.ts line 282 uses select('*') returning ALL columns including large JSONB blobs (template, pricing_roles, billing_info) just to render a list. Replace with: id, client_name, sow_title, status, created_at, updated_at, version, is_latest, parent_id + author join. Biggest single payload win in the app.

title: Dashboard: parallelize stats/recentSOWs/pendingApprovals queries
notes: getDashboardStats() in src/app/dashboard/page.tsx runs 4 queries sequentially. After the initial user lookup, the other 3 (stats, recentSOWs, pendingApprovals) are fully independent. Wrap in Promise.all() to run in parallel. Should cut dashboard load time by ~60-70%.

title: Dashboard: remove duplicate fallback queries
notes: dashboard/page.tsx has try/catch fallback blocks that run byte-for-byte identical queries to the primary. They can't succeed if the primary failed for a structural reason. Remove the fallback duplication - if the query fails, return empty data and log the error.

title: next.config.js: add experimental.optimizePackageImports for heavy deps
notes: next.config.js has zero optimization settings. Add experimental.optimizePackageImports for packages that don't self-tree-shake: @tiptap/react, @tiptap/starter-kit, googleapis, jsforce, @react-pdf/renderer. This reduces bundle size by only importing used exports.

title: Add pagination to SOW list page
notes: SOW list (/sow) fetches ALL SOWs into memory with no limit. Client-side sorting/grouping processes everything in-browser. Need cursor-based or offset pagination with server-side filtering.

title: Dashboard: fix getServerSession() missing authOptions arg
notes: src/app/dashboard/page.tsx calls getServerSession() without authOptions, while all API routes call getServerSession(authOptions). Inconsistent usage can cause session data mismatches (missing role, email, etc). Fix: import authOptions from @/lib/auth and pass it.

title: Analyst Review: UX, Security, and Product Improvements
notes: Issues surfaced from comprehensive analyst audit of the full application in March 2026. Covers security gaps, data bugs, UX improvements, and feature gaps.

title: Security: add auth check to /api/salesforce/search-accounts — currently unauthenticated
notes: GET /api/salesforce/search-accounts has no getServerSession() check. Any unauthenticated caller can query your Salesforce account data.

title: UX: Add save feedback — 'Last saved at X' indicator and explicit save status in SOW edit form
notes: Multi-tab SOW editor gives no visible indication that changes were saved. Users don't know if their work persisted.

title: UX: Add full-text search to SOW list page
notes: With 114+ SOWs, users need to be able to search by client name, SOW title, or author. Current UI only has status filter tabs and sort columns.

title: UX: Show approver names and contact info in approval workflow status view
notes: When SOW is 'In Review', the status tab shows stage name and Pending badge but not WHO needs to approve. Show approver name and email so author knows who to contact.

title: UX: Add tab completion indicators to SOW edit form (checkmark/warning badge per tab)
notes: 8-tab SOW editor gives no indication which tabs are complete or have validation errors. Users must click every tab to find issues before submission.

title: UX: Surface change orders on SOW view page — count, status, and link
notes: The SOW view page has no mention of change orders. If 3 COs exist for an approved SOW, users navigating to the SOW see nothing about them.

title: UX: Improve SOW list versioning display — collapse versions under client with expand
notes: AppOmni with 6 versions shows as 7 rows (one parent + 6 children) with identical client/project names. Hard to scan. Should show one row per client with 'v6 (Latest)' and a collapse/expand for prior versions.

title: Feature: Allow SOW creation without Salesforce account (manual override path)
notes: SOW creation wizard requires Salesforce account. If SF is down or user needs an internal/test SOW, they are completely blocked. Add manual override option.

title: Security: gate or remove debug/test pages from production (/debug-account-segment, /test-account-segment, /google-drive-demo)
notes: Three debug/test pages are live with no auth check. /debug-account-segment and /test-account-segment expose internal logic; /google-drive-demo exposes Google Drive picker. Remove or add admin-only guard.

title: Security: fix RLS bypass — service role client used for all queries, disabling row-level security entirely
notes: supabase-server.ts uses service role key for all authenticated users with comment 'bypass RLS while we fix JWT token passing'. This means every authenticated user can read every SOW. Needs proper JWT passthrough to Supabase.

title: Bug: Author column shows 'Unknown' on SOW list — author_id FK join not returning data for most SOWs
notes: api/sow/route.ts returns author?.[0]?.name || 'Unknown'. Likely older SOWs have null author_id. Need to investigate and either backfill or handle gracefully.

title: Bug: 'Hidden SOWs' filter badge shows total SOW count (114) instead of hidden count
notes: sow/page.tsx line ~581: Hidden SOWs button shows sows.length which is the total count of the current view. Should not show a misleading count — remove count or fetch actual hidden count.

title: Bug: 'My Recent SOWs' on dashboard shows all users' SOWs, not the current user's
notes: dashboard/page.tsx recentSOWs query has no author_id filter. Need to add .eq('author_id', userResult.data.id) to filter by the logged-in user.

title: UX: Remove or replace 'BETA TESTING VERSION — DO NOT USE FOR PRODUCTION' banner
notes: Banner shows on every page but app has 114 SOWs and is clearly in production. Replace with a version indicator or remove entirely.

title: UX: Rename 'Tools' nav dropdown to list actual contents (Pricing Calculator, SOW Preview)
notes: Navigation.tsx shows 'Tools' dropdown but contents are 'Pricing Calculator' and 'SOW Preview'. Either rename or inline these links.

title: UX: Replace all browser alert()/confirm()/prompt() calls with proper modal/toast notifications
notes: app/sow/page.tsx uses prompt() to require 'HIDE'/'UNHIDE' text confirmation. SOWDisplay uses alert() for errors. SOWForm uses alert() for success/failure. All should use in-app modals.

title: Parallelize SOW view API calls with Promise.all
notes: SOWDisplay.tsx makes sequential API calls: SOW data -> Salesforce data -> Products. Should use Promise.all() for parallel fetching. Lines 454-628.

title: Add admin role checks to unprotected admin API endpoints
notes: Multiple /api/admin/* endpoints have TODO comments for admin role checks. Any authenticated user can access admin features including gemini-logs and product-categories. Fix by adding role verification.

title: Remove or gate debug/test pages from production
notes: Pages that should not be in production: /google-drive-demo, /test-account-segment, /debug-account-segment, /pricing-calculator, /salesforce-fields-explorer. These leak implementation details.

title: Add database indexes for common query patterns
notes: Missing indexes on: (is_hidden, created_at) for dashboard, (status, created_at) for filtered lists, (salesforce_account_id) for account lookups, (author_id) for user queries.

title: Implement dynamic imports and code splitting for SOW display
notes: SOWDisplay.tsx eagerly imports all sub-components (approval workflow, comments, revisions, Google Drive, TipTap editor). Use next/dynamic for tab-based content. ~150KB+ unnecessary JS on initial load.

title: Break up god components - SOWDisplay (1971 LOC), SOWForm (1485 LOC)
notes: SOWDisplay has 7+ responsibilities: tab mgmt, approval display, comments, revision history, PDF generation, Slack notifications, validation. Extract into: SOWTabContainer, ApprovalPanel, CommentSection, RevisionPanel. Similar decomposition needed for SOWForm and ObjectivesTab (1501 LOC).

title: Consolidate 5 Slack modules into unified service
notes: Five overlapping files: slack.ts (17KB), slack-mention-utils.ts, slack-mention-service.ts, slack-user-lookup.ts, slack-user-mapping-service.ts. Potential duplicate logic for user lookups. Consolidate into single slack/ service directory.

title: Research enterprise flow requirements - determine if enterprise SOW workflow differs from standard flow and what changes are needed to support it
Increase Salesforce account search limit and prioritize exact/starts-with matches
notes: SOQL LIMIT raised from 20 to 50. Added client-side sort: exact match first, then starts-with, then contains. Fixes issue where searching 'vantage' buried the actual Vantage account under dozens of 'Advantage' results.
